news.headline: Trump booed in New York as he becomes first US president to attend NBA Finals
news.summary: The catcalls came after ticketholders faced airport-style security to enter the venue at Madison Square Garden.

news.headline: Nikol Pashinyan Wins Re-election in Armenia
news.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan overcame a pressure campaign by Moscow and was on track to win a mandate to move ahead on peace talks that President Trump helped broker.
